Package iwedia.dtv.pvr

Class PvrControl

java.lang.Object
iwedia.dtv.DtvControl<com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.IPvrControl>
iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrControl
public class PvrControl extends DtvControl<com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.IPvrControl>
Base class for PVR (Personal Video Recorder) functionalities.

      Parameters:
      routeID - Identifier of the specific route.
      smartCreateParams - Creation parameters for smart record.

    • destroyRecord

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus destroyRecord(int handle)
      Stops and removes created record. The recorded media is saved to mass storage.
      Parameters:
      handle - Handle of the specific record event (acquired via getRecordHandle).

    • stopRecord

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus stopRecord(int handle)
      Stops running record. The recorded media is saved to mass storage.
      Parameters:
      handle - Handle of the specific record event (acquired via getRecordHandle).

      Updates record list.
      Returns:

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus protect(int handle, boolean protect)

      handle - Handle of the specific media to protect/unprotect
      protect - Wheter to protect or unprotect the recorded PVR media

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus jump(int routeID, int position, boolean relative)
      Jumps on given position of playback/timeshift.
      Parameters:
      routeID - Identifier of the specific route.
      position - Position of plaback/timeshift (in miliseconds).
      relative - TRUE if relative, FALSE if absolute.

      Checks if new reminder will cause conflicts
      Parameters:
      params - Create parameters of new reminder
      conflictReport - Report of conflict with reserved recordings or reminders.

      Parameters:
      handle - - Handle of the specific recording

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus clearMediaErrorFlag(int handle)
      Clears media's error flag in recordings.db
      Parameters:
      handle - - Handle of the specific media

    • registerListener

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus registerListener(PvrListener listener)
      Registers application callback for PVR events.
      Parameters:
      listener - Callback to register.

    • unregisterListener

      public void unregisterListener(PvrListener listener)
      Unregisters application callback for PVR events.
      Parameters:
      listener - Callback to unregister.

    • findContentIdList

      public List<Integer> findContentIdList(String storageId, com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrSortMode sortType, com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrSortOrder sortOrder, String[] inUserIdFilter, String[] notInUserIdFilter, int[] inGenreFilter, int[] notInGenreFilter)
      Gets the identifiers of recorded media that matches the proposed criteria.
      Parameters:
      storageId - Id of storage device to be searched
      sortType - Sort mode for generated list of handles (PvrSortMode)
      sortOrder - Sort order for generated list of handles (PvrSortOrder)
      inUserIdFilter - Match mask for User id
      notInUserIdFilter - Not maatch mask for User id
      inGenreFilter - Match mask for genre
      notInGenreFilter - Not match mask for genre
      Returns:
      Handles of media that matches the proposed criteria.

    • findScheduledEventIds

      public List<Integer> findScheduledEventIds(int handle)
      Gets the identifiers of the EPG events that are going to be recorded according to the smart recordings criteria.
      Parameters:
      handle - Id of the Scheduled recording
      Returns:
      Identifiers of EPG events that match the proposed criteria.

    • checkRecordConflict

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus checkRecordConflict(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.TimerCreateParams timerCreateParams, com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.ConflictReport[] conflictReport)
      Check recording conflict.
      Parameters:
      timerCreateParams - Timer parameters to check.
      conflictReport - Report with conflict with reserved recordings.

    • setAutoDeleteMode

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus setAutoDeleteMode(boolean autoDelete)
      Sets PVR auto delete mode.
      Parameters:
      autoDelete - Auto delete mode (enabled/disabled)

      public void restoreScheduledDatabase()

    • getPlaybackEventInfo

      public com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.EventInfo getPlaybackEventInfo()

    • findContentIdList2

      public List<Integer> findContentIdList2(String storageId, com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrSortMode sortType, com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrSortOrder sortOrder, String[] inUserIdFilter, String[] notInUserIdFilter, int[] inGenreFilter, int[] notInGenreFilter, String inSeriesManageIdFilter)
      Gets the identifiers of recorded media that matches the proposed criteria.
      Parameters:
      storageId - Id of storage device to be searched
      sortType - Sort mode for generated list of handles (PvrSortMode)
      sortOrder - Sort order for generated list of handles (PvrSortOrder)
      inUserIdFilter - Match mask for User id
      notInUserIdFilter - Not maatch mask for User id
      inGenreFilter - Match mask for genre
      inSeriesManageIdFilter - Match mask for series manage ID
      Returns:
      Handles of media that matches the proposed criteria.
